subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Upon thee be my Glory! Let Munírih remain until her eye is fully restored, for movement would prove harmful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خانم علیک بهائی منیره بماند تا چشمش بهبودی حاصل نماید حرکت مضراست
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
